prompt: Make a person page for Augusto Pinochet for the Context website. I want it to cover his military background, the 1973 coup against Allende, his economic policies (the Chicago Boys experiment), the human rights atrocities (DINA, Operation Condor, the disappeared), his late-life legal battles, and the honest debate about whether Chile's economic development justifies or is even correctly attributed to him. Should be fair — present the arguments people actually make, not a one-sided condemnation.

assertions.name: Purple used as primary accent throughout
CSS includes all required design system variables
Chicago Boys economic experiment covered with substance
DINA and number of disappeared/killed documented with specific figures
Legacy section presents both economic case FOR and human rights case AGAINST
Ideology or worldview section present with multiple cards (.ideology-card)
